info.title: Flow Creator Configurator APIs Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. Published API scope centers on provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle management for Industrial Edge assets and apps.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Flow Creator Configurator APIs. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Industrial Edge is an open, ready-to-use edge computing platform, with edge devices, edge applications (apps) and connectivity through an integrated app and device management infrastructure. These APIs are administrative and configuration-oriented surfaces for apps, devices, and low-code flow setup across Industrial Edge. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
